text.title: Ai Assisted Velocity Anomaly Detection — Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Does the team have ≥6 sprint baseline, ≥4 people, fresh tracker, and a named owner for the response?

branch.when: sprint_baseline_count >= 6 AND team_size >= 4 AND tracker_lag_days < 3 AND owner_named == true
branch.conclusion: Run weekly detection with calibrated thresholds. Route every anomaly to the named owner.
Block. Collect baseline first; thresholds without baseline are random.
Skip. Small sample or stale data — manual feel is better.
